title: Regional Key Account Director (Pharmaceutical, FMCG)
description:
Job Description:

  • Formulate and implement regional sales and key-account plans to meet revenue and growth objectives across Southeast Asia.
  • Oversee a portfolio of strategic accounts, maintaining strong customer satisfaction, loyalty, and account growth.
  • Identify and capitalize on new business opportunities, including new customers, product offerings, and market expansion.
  • Drive sales negotiations, contract discussions, pricing agreements, and deal closures with key clients or distributors.
  • Work closely with cross-functional teams (such as medical affairs, regulatory, marketing, and supply chain) to support successful product launches, regulatory compliance, supply continuity, and customer service.
  • Provide leadership and strategic guidance to the regional sales and key-account team; coach, mentor, and manage team members.
  • Track market dynamics, competitor activities, and regulatory developments across SEA, adjusting strategies as needed.
  • Deliver regular updates to senior management on sales results, market insights, forecasts, and potential risks.
  • Ensure adherence to internal policies, industry standards, and ethical and regulatory requirements.
  • Establish and sustain long-term strategic partnerships with key accounts, distributors, government bodies, and other stakeholders.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing or any related fields.
  • Minimum 8 years of sales experience in the FMCG industry,  pharmaceutical or healthcare
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills

Interested applicants for the above advertised position(s), please kindly email an updated copy of your resume to: gs1@talenttradersg.com;


EA License No.: 13C6305

Registration No.: R23117856 CHOE KIN MUN


For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.

postedCompany.description:
TALENT TRADER GROUP PTE. LTD.

Talent Trader is steered by young, dynamic professionals; each of them bringing their own vast experiences from leading Banks and HR Agencies.


We provide efficient talent sourcing, recruitment and retention services that help companies acquire effective Mid-management talent.


We offer the following value-added services for a variety of Mid-management positions across industry veticals such as Banking, Marine, Offshore, Retail, IT, F&B, Education, Manufacturing and Others:


- Talent Sourcing and Recruitment

- International Recruitment

- Contract & Temporary Staffing

- Payroll Services

- Employment Passes
